questionHtml: Draw a section of isotactic polychloroethene (polyvinylchloride, PVC) showing all the atoms and all the bonds of four monomer units.
markschemeHtml:
correct bonding  [✔]

Cl atoms all on same side and alternate  [✔]

 

Note: Continuation bonds must be shown.

Award [1 max] if less than or more than four units shown.

Accept a stereo formula with all atoms and bonds shown.

meta.title: Draw a section of isotactic polychloroethene (polyvinylchloride, PVC) showing all the atoms and all the bonds of four monomer units.
